query: SELECT cg.productId, cg.maxQuantity, p.name, p.status FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON p.id = cg.productId WHERE cg.name = 'Adicionais' AND cg.maxQuantity = 50 ORDER BY cg.productId LIMIT 5;
